JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT To The Complaint Of Albert Patane, Or, In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Samuel Ray, Esq., Colla & Ray LLP, 415-579-1414, sam@collaray.com, for Plaintiff ALBERT PATANE,
Mehron Assadi, Esq., Bledsoe, diestel, Treppa, & Crane LLP., (415) 981-5411, rassadi@bledsoelaw.com for Defendants Gale Lea Grinsell, Former Trustee of the Equity Growth Asset Management 401(k) Profit Sharing Plan, and Founders Realty, Inc..
Nancy Presant CSR 9006, 510-757-8550, npresantcsr@gmail.com, Court Reporter

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

DEFENDANTS GALE LEA GRINSELL, FOUNDERS REALTY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT To The Complaint Of Albert Patane, Or, In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is framed by the allegations in the Complaint. Defendant failed to shift its burden and show that there are not triable issues of fact/Defendant is entitled to a judgment as a matter of law as to the entirety of the Complaint or any individual cause of action. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order verbatim to the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported (D501)
